narrative:
Precinct Monroeville Village (precinct in Huron County) has 757 registered voters, with 61.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.0%, a clear Republican lean of 6.3 percentage points.
